detail.zhHant: Set out Shrimp, Tortillas, Zucchini, Lime, Olive oil, warm the staple or bread, and cut the vegetables into pieces that fit cleanly in two bowls, wraps, or plates.
detail.yue: Set out Shrimp, Tortillas, Zucchini, Lime, Olive oil, warm the staple or bread, and cut the vegetables into pieces that fit cleanly in two bowls, wraps, or plates.
detail.en: Set out Shrimp, Tortillas, Zucchini, Lime, Olive oil, warm the staple or bread, and cut the vegetables into pieces that fit cleanly in two bowls, wraps, or plates.

detail.zhHant: Cook Shrimp in a hot pan until savory and fully heated, then move it to a plate so the fresh ingredients stay crisp during assembly.
detail.yue: Cook Shrimp in a hot pan until savory and fully heated, then move it to a plate so the fresh ingredients stay crisp during assembly.
detail.en: Cook Shrimp in a hot pan until savory and fully heated, then move it to a plate so the fresh ingredients stay crisp during assembly.

detail.zhHant: Build each portion with the staple first, then vegetables, sauce, and Shrimp; keep wet sauces away from the bread edge until serving.
detail.yue: Build each portion with the staple first, then vegetables, sauce, and Shrimp; keep wet sauces away from the bread edge until serving.
detail.en: Build each portion with the staple first, then vegetables, sauce, and Shrimp; keep wet sauces away from the bread edge until serving.

detail.zhHant: Finish Shrimp Taco Bowl with herbs or lime, taste one bite for balance, and serve right away while warm items are still warm and crisp items stay fresh.
